name: Dragonborn
traits: Draconic ancestry, breath weapon, and damage resistance.
description: Draconic humanoids with proud heritage and elemental breath.

name: Dwarf
traits: Darkvision, dwarven resilience, stonecunning, and weapon proficiencies.
description: Hardy folk known for resilience, craft, and tradition.

name: Elf
traits: Darkvision, keen senses, fey ancestry, and trance.
description: Graceful people with keen perception and fey heritage.

name: Gnome
traits: Darkvision and gnome cunning against magic effects.
description: Inventive and curious smallfolk with magical aptitude.

name: Half-Elf
traits: Darkvision, fey ancestry, and extra versatility.
description: Adaptable bridge between human and elven cultures.

name: Half-Orc
traits: Darkvision, relentless endurance, and savage attacks.

name: Halfling
description: Nimble and cheerful smallfolk with remarkable luck.

name: Human
description: Highly adaptable people present in every region and role.

name: Tiefling
traits: Darkvision, hellish resistance, and infernal legacy magic.
description: Marked by fiendish lineage and innate arcane talent.
